queries.question: What are the advanced topics of the course taught by Mrs. Williams and its core concepts?
queries.sql:
SELECT Core_Concepts, Advanced_Topics FROM Courses
WHERE TeachersName  LIKE "%Williams%"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?core_concepts ?advanced_topics WHERE {
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?courses p:Core_Concepts ?core_concepts .
  ?courses p:Advanced_Topics ?advanced_topics .
  ?courses p:TeachersName ?teachersname_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?teachersname_lk), "^.*Williams.*$"))
}

queries.question: What are the core concepts and advanced topics of Math 101?
queries.sql:
SELECT Core_Concepts, Advanced_Topics FROM Courses
WHERE CourseName="Math 101"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?core_concepts ?advanced_topics WHERE {
  ?courses a :Courses .
  ?courses p:Core_Concepts ?core_concepts .
  ?courses p:Advanced_Topics ?advanced_topics .
  ?courses p:CourseName ?coursename_f .
  FILTER(STR(?coursename_f) = STR("Math 101"))
}
